name: callbell
description: Callbell steering, distributed as a plugin: one always-on core plus optional purpose packs.

plugins.name: callbell-dev
plugins.description: Code pack: the laziest solution that actually works, at three levels, plus review, audit, debt and gain. Requires the callbell core.

plugins.name: callbell-sysadmin
plugins.description: Sysadmin pack: a passive safety layer plus on-demand server-ops skills, active where a host identity is declared. Requires the callbell core.
